title: The Bible
subtitle: Holy Scripture of Christianity
description: The sacred text of Christianity, consisting of the Old Testament (Hebrew scriptures) and New Testament (teachings of Jesus and early church), compiled over approximately 1,500 years.
summary: The Bible tells the story of God's relationship with humanity—from creation and the covenant with Israel, through the life, death, and resurrection of Jesus Christ, to the establishment of the early church. It encompasses law, history, prophecy, poetry, and gospel.

verses.text: A light to lighten the Gentiles, and the glory of thy people Israel.
verses.explanation: Jesus is born in Bethlehem and announced by angels to shepherds. As it is written: "A light to lighten the Gentiles, and the glory of thy people Israel."

verses.text: And the child grew, and waxed strong in spirit, filled with wisdom: and the grace of God was upon him.
verses.explanation: Jesus is born in Bethlehem and announced by angels to shepherds. As it is written: "And the child grew, and waxed strong in spirit, filled with wisdom: and the g...."

verses.text: And Jesus increased in wisdom and stature, and in favour with God and man.
verses.explanation: Jesus is born in Bethlehem and announced by angels to shepherds. As it is written: "And Jesus increased in wisdom and stature, and in favour with God and man."

verses.text: And he lifted up his eyes on his disciples, and said, Blessed be ye poor: for yours is the kingdom of God.
verses.explanation: Jesus teaches the Beatitudes and the ethics of the Kingdom. As it is written: "And he lifted up his eyes on his disciples, and said, Blessed be ye poor: for...."

verses.text: Blessed are ye that hunger now: for ye shall be filled. Blessed are ye that weep now: for ye shall laugh.
verses.explanation: Jesus teaches the Beatitudes and the ethics of the Kingdom. Jesus declares: "Blessed are ye that hunger now: for ye shall be filled. Blessed are ye that w...."

verses.text: Blessed are ye, when men shall hate you, and when they shall separate you from their company, and shall reproach you, and cast out your name as evil, for the Son of man's sake.
verses.explanation: Jesus teaches the Beatitudes and the ethics of the Kingdom. Jesus declares: "Blessed are ye, when men shall hate you, and when they shall separate you fro...."

verses.text: But I say unto you which hear, Love your enemies, do good to them which hate you,
verses.explanation: Jesus teaches the Beatitudes and the ethics of the Kingdom. As it is written: "But I say unto you which hear, Love your enemies, do good to them which hate ...."

verses.text: Bless them that curse you, and pray for them which despitefully use you.
verses.explanation: Jesus teaches the Beatitudes and the ethics of the Kingdom. As it is written: "Bless them that curse you, and pray for them which despitefully use you."

verses.text: And unto him that smiteth thee on the one cheek offer also the other; and him that taketh away thy cloak forbid not to take thy coat also.
verses.explanation: Jesus teaches the Beatitudes and the ethics of the Kingdom. As it is written: "And unto him that smiteth thee on the one cheek offer also the other; and him...."

verses.text: Give to every man that asketh of thee; and of him that taketh away thy goods ask them not again.
verses.explanation: Jesus teaches the Beatitudes and the ethics of the Kingdom. As it is written: "Give to every man that asketh of thee; and of him that taketh away thy goods ...."

verses.text: And as ye would that men should do to you, do ye also to them likewise.
verses.explanation: Jesus teaches the Beatitudes and the ethics of the Kingdom. As it is written: "And as ye would that men should do to you, do ye also to them likewise."

verses.text: But love ye your enemies, and do good, and lend, hoping for nothing again; and your reward shall be great, and ye shall be the children of the Highest: for he is kind unto the unthankful and to the evil.
verses.explanation: Jesus teaches the Beatitudes and the ethics of the Kingdom. As it is written: "But love ye your enemies, and do good, and lend, hoping for nothing again; an...."

verses.text: Be ye therefore merciful, as your Father also is merciful.
verses.explanation: Jesus teaches the Beatitudes and the ethics of the Kingdom. As it is written: "Be ye therefore merciful, as your Father also is merciful."

verses.text: Judge not, and ye shall not be judged: condemn not, and ye shall not be condemned: forgive, and ye shall be forgiven:
verses.explanation: Jesus teaches the Beatitudes and the ethics of the Kingdom. As it is written: "Judge not, and ye shall not be judged: condemn not, and ye shall not be conde...."

verses.text: Give, and it shall be given unto you; good measure, pressed down, and shaken together, and running over, shall men give into your bosom. For with the same measure that ye mete withal it shall be measured to you again.
verses.explanation: Jesus teaches the Beatitudes and the ethics of the Kingdom. As it is written: "Give, and it shall be given unto you; good measure, pressed down, and shaken ...."

verses.text: And why beholdest thou the mote that is in thy brother's eye, but perceivest not the beam that is in thine own eye?
verses.explanation: Jesus teaches the Beatitudes and the ethics of the Kingdom. As it is written: "And why beholdest thou the mote that is in thy brother's eye, but perceivest ...."

verses.text: Either how canst thou say to thy brother, Brother, let me pull out the mote that is in thine eye, when thou thyself beholdest not the beam that is in thine own eye? Thou hypocrite, cast out first the beam out of thine own eye, and then shalt thou see clearly to pull out the mote that is out of thy brother's eye.
verses.explanation: Jesus teaches the Beatitudes and the ethics of the Kingdom. As it is written: "Either how canst thou say to thy brother, Brother, let me pull out the mote t...."

verses.text: For a good tree bringeth not forth corrupt fruit; neither doth a corrupt tree bring forth good fruit.
verses.explanation: Jesus teaches the Beatitudes and the ethics of the Kingdom. As it is written: "For a good tree bringeth not forth corrupt fruit; neither doth a corrupt tree...."

verses.text: For every tree is known by his own fruit. For of thorns men do not gather figs, nor of a bramble bush gather they grapes.
verses.explanation: Jesus teaches the Beatitudes and the ethics of the Kingdom. As it is written: "For every tree is known by his own fruit. For of thorns men do not gather fig...."

verses.text: A good man out of the good treasure of his heart bringeth forth that which is good; and an evil man out of the evil treasure of his heart bringeth forth that which is evil: for of the abundance of the heart his mouth speaketh.
verses.explanation: Jesus teaches the Beatitudes and the ethics of the Kingdom. As it is written: "A good man out of the good treasure of his heart bringeth forth that which is...."

verses.text: And why call ye me, Lord, Lord, and do not the things which I say?
verses.explanation: Jesus teaches the Beatitudes and the ethics of the Kingdom. As it is written: "And why call ye me, Lord, Lord, and do not the things which I say?."

verses.text: Whosoever cometh to me, and heareth my sayings, and doeth them, I will shew you to whom he is like:
verses.explanation: Jesus teaches the Beatitudes and the ethics of the Kingdom. As it is written: "Whosoever cometh to me, and heareth my sayings, and doeth them, I will shew y...."

verses.text: He is like a man which built an house, and digged deep, and laid the foundation on a rock: and when the flood arose, the stream beat vehemently upon that house, and could not shake it: for it was founded upon a rock.
verses.explanation: Jesus teaches the Beatitudes and the ethics of the Kingdom. As it is written: "He is like a man which built an house, and digged deep, and laid the foundati...."

verses.text: But he that heareth, and doeth not, is like a man that without a foundation built an house upon the earth; against which the stream did beat vehemently, and immediately it fell; and the ruin of that house was great.
verses.explanation: Jesus teaches the Beatitudes and the ethics of the Kingdom. As it is written: "But he that heareth, and doeth not, is like a man that without a foundation b...."

verses.text: But ye shall receive power, after that the Holy Ghost is come upon you: and ye shall be witnesses unto me both in Jerusalem, and in all Judaea, and in Samaria, and unto the uttermost part of the earth.
verses.explanation: Jesus ascends to heaven and promises the Holy Spirit to His disciples. As it is written: "But ye shall receive power, after that the Holy Ghost is come upon you: and y...."

verses.text: And when he had spoken these things, while they beheld, he was taken up; and a cloud received him out of their sight.
verses.explanation: Jesus ascends to heaven and promises the Holy Spirit to His disciples. As it is written: "And when he had spoken these things, while they beheld, he was taken up; and ...."

verses.text: And while they looked stedfastly toward heaven as he went up, behold, two men stood by them in white apparel;
verses.explanation: Jesus ascends to heaven and promises the Holy Spirit to His disciples. As it is written: "And while they looked stedfastly toward heaven as he went up, behold, two men...."

verses.text: Which also said, Ye men of Galilee, why stand ye gazing up into heaven? this same Jesus, which is taken up from you into heaven, shall so come in like manner as ye have seen him go into heaven.
verses.explanation: Jesus ascends to heaven and promises the Holy Spirit to His disciples. Jesus teaches: "Which also said, Ye men of Galilee, why stand ye gazing up into heaven? this ...."

verses.text: Peter therefore was kept in prison: but prayer was made without ceasing of the church unto God for him.
verses.explanation: Peter is miraculously freed from prison through prayer. As it is written: "Peter therefore was kept in prison: but prayer was made without ceasing of th...."

verses.text: And when Herod would have brought him forth, the same night Peter was sleeping between two soldiers, bound with two chains: and the keepers before the door kept the prison.
verses.explanation: Peter is miraculously freed from prison through prayer. As it is written: "And when Herod would have brought him forth, the same night Peter was sleepin...."

verses.text: And, behold, the angel of the Lord came upon him, and a light shined in the prison: and he smote Peter on the side, and raised him up, saying, Arise up quickly. And his chains fell off from his hands.
verses.explanation: Peter is miraculously freed from prison through prayer. As it is written: "And, behold, the angel of the Lord came upon him, and a light shined in the p...."

verses.text: And the angel said unto him, Gird thyself, and bind on thy sandals. And so he did. And he saith unto him, Cast thy garment about thee, and follow me.
verses.explanation: Peter is miraculously freed from prison through prayer. As it is written: "And the angel said unto him, Gird thyself, and bind on thy sandals. And so he...."

verses.text: And he went out, and followed him; and wist not that it was true which was done by the angel; but thought he saw a vision.
verses.explanation: Peter is miraculously freed from prison through prayer. As it is written: "And he went out, and followed him; and wist not that it was true which was do...."

verses.text: When they were past the first and the second ward, they came unto the iron gate that leadeth unto the city; which opened to them of his own accord: and they went out, and passed on through one street; and forthwith the angel departed from him.
verses.explanation: Peter is miraculously freed from prison through prayer. As it is written: "When they were past the first and the second ward, they came unto the iron ga...."

verses.text: And when Peter was come to himself, he said, Now I know of a surety, that the Lord hath sent his angel, and hath delivered me out of the hand of Herod.
verses.explanation: Peter is miraculously freed from prison through prayer. As it is written: "And when Peter was come to himself, he said, Now I know of a surety, that the...."

verses.text: I beseech you therefore, brethren, by the mercies of God, that ye present your bodies a living sacrifice, holy, acceptable unto God, which is your reasonable service.
verses.explanation: Paul calls believers to offer themselves as living sacrifices and live in love. As it is written: "I beseech you therefore, brethren, by the mercies of God, that ye present you...."

verses.text: And be not conformed to this world: but be ye transformed by the renewing of your mind, that ye may prove what is that good, and acceptable, and perfect, will of God.
verses.explanation: Paul calls believers to offer themselves as living sacrifices and live in love. As it is written: "And be not conformed to this world: but be ye transformed by the renewing of ...."

verses.text: For I say, through the grace given unto me, to every man that is among you, not to think of himself more highly than he ought to think; but to think soberly, according as God hath dealt to every man the measure of faith.
verses.explanation: Paul calls believers to offer themselves as living sacrifices and live in love. As it is written: "For I say, through the grace given unto me, to every man that is among you, n...."

verses.text: Let love be without dissimulation. Abhor that which is evil; cleave to that which is good.
verses.explanation: Paul calls believers to offer themselves as living sacrifices and live in love, commanding His people: "Let love be without dissimulation. Abhor that which is evil; cleave to that w...."

verses.text: Be kindly affectioned one to another with brotherly love; in honour preferring one another;
verses.explanation: Paul calls believers to offer themselves as living sacrifices and live in love. As it is written: "Be kindly affectioned one to another with brotherly love; in honour preferrin...."

verses.text: Not slothful in business; fervent in spirit; serving the Lord;
verses.explanation: Paul calls believers to offer themselves as living sacrifices and live in love. As it is written: "Not slothful in business; fervent in spirit; serving the Lord;."

verses.text: Rejoicing in hope; patient in tribulation; continuing instant in prayer;
verses.explanation: Paul calls believers to offer themselves as living sacrifices and live in love. As it is written: "Rejoicing in hope; patient in tribulation; continuing instant in prayer;."

verses.text: Distributing to the necessity of saints; given to hospitality.
verses.explanation: Paul calls believers to offer themselves as living sacrifices and live in love. As it is written: "Distributing to the necessity of saints; given to hospitality."

verses.text: Bless them which persecute you: bless, and curse not.
verses.explanation: Paul calls believers to offer themselves as living sacrifices and live in love. As it is written: "Bless them which persecute you: bless, and curse not."

verses.text: Rejoice with them that do rejoice, and weep with them that weep.
verses.explanation: Paul calls believers to offer themselves as living sacrifices and live in love. As it is written: "Rejoice with them that do rejoice, and weep with them that weep."

verses.text: Be of the same mind one toward another. Mind not high things, but condescend to men of low estate. Be not wise in your own conceits.
verses.explanation: Paul calls believers to offer themselves as living sacrifices and live in love. As it is written: "Be of the same mind one toward another. Mind not high things, but condescend ...."

verses.text: Recompense to no man evil for evil. Provide things honest in the sight of all men.
verses.explanation: Paul calls believers to offer themselves as living sacrifices and live in love. As it is written: "Recompense to no man evil for evil. Provide things honest in the sight of all...."

verses.text: If it be possible, as much as lieth in you, live peaceably with all men.
verses.explanation: Paul calls believers to offer themselves as living sacrifices and live in love. As it is written: "If it be possible, as much as lieth in you, live peaceably with all men."

verses.text: Dearly beloved, avenge not yourselves, but rather give place unto wrath: for it is written, Vengeance is mine; I will repay, saith the Lord.
verses.explanation: Paul calls believers to offer themselves as living sacrifices and live in love. As it is written: "Dearly beloved, avenge not yourselves, but rather give place unto wrath: for ...."

verses.text: Therefore if thine enemy hunger, feed him; if he thirst, give him drink: for in so doing thou shalt heap coals of fire on his head.
verses.explanation: Paul calls believers to offer themselves as living sacrifices and live in love. As it is written: "Therefore if thine enemy hunger, feed him; if he thirst, give him drink: for ...."

verses.text: Be not overcome of evil, but overcome evil with good.
verses.explanation: Paul calls believers to offer themselves as living sacrifices and live in love. As it is written: "Be not overcome of evil, but overcome evil with good."

verses.text: Now there are diversities of gifts, but the same Spirit.
verses.explanation: The diversity of spiritual gifts in the body of Christ, each given for the common good. As it is written: "Now there are diversities of gifts, but the same Spirit."

verses.text: And there are differences of administrations, but the same Lord.
verses.explanation: The diversity of spiritual gifts in the body of Christ, each given for the common good. As it is written: "And there are differences of administrations, but the same Lord."

verses.text: And there are diversities of operations, but it is the same God which worketh all in all.
verses.explanation: The diversity of spiritual gifts in the body of Christ, each given for the common good. As it is written: "And there are diversities of operations, but it is the same God which worketh...."

verses.text: But the manifestation of the Spirit is given to every man to profit withal.
verses.explanation: The diversity of spiritual gifts in the body of Christ, each given for the common good. As it is written: "But the manifestation of the Spirit is given to every man to profit withal."

verses.text: For to one is given by the Spirit the word of wisdom; to another the word of knowledge by the same Spirit;
verses.explanation: The diversity of spiritual gifts in the body of Christ, each given for the common good. As it is written: "For to one is given by the Spirit the word of wisdom; to another the word of ...."

verses.text: To another faith by the same Spirit; to another the gifts of healing by the same Spirit;
verses.explanation: The diversity of spiritual gifts in the body of Christ, each given for the common good. As it is written: "To another faith by the same Spirit; to another the gifts of healing by the s...."

verses.text: To another the working of miracles; to another prophecy; to another discerning of spirits; to another divers kinds of tongues; to another the interpretation of tongues:
verses.explanation: The diversity of spiritual gifts in the body of Christ, each given for the common good. As it is written: "To another the working of miracles; to another prophecy; to another discernin...."

verses.text: But all these worketh that one and the selfsame Spirit, dividing to every man severally as he will.
verses.explanation: The diversity of spiritual gifts in the body of Christ, each given for the common good. As it is written: "But all these worketh that one and the selfsame Spirit, dividing to every man...."

verses.text: For as the body is one, and hath many members, and all the members of that one body, being many, are one body: so also is Christ.
verses.explanation: The diversity of spiritual gifts in the body of Christ, each given for the common good. As it is written: "For as the body is one, and hath many members, and all the members of that on...."

verses.text: For by one Spirit are we all baptized into one body, whether we be Jews or Gentiles, whether we be bond or free; and have been all made to drink into one Spirit.
verses.explanation: The diversity of spiritual gifts in the body of Christ, each given for the common good. As it is written: "For by one Spirit are we all baptized into one body, whether we be Jews or Ge...."

verses.text: For the body is not one member, but many.
verses.explanation: The diversity of spiritual gifts in the body of Christ, each given for the common good. As it is written: "For the body is not one member, but many."

verses.text: But now hath God set the members every one of them in the body, as it hath pleased him.
verses.explanation: The diversity of spiritual gifts in the body of Christ, each given for the common good. As it is written: "But now hath God set the members every one of them in the body, as it hath pl...."

verses.text: And whether one member suffer, all the members suffer with it; or one member be honoured, all the members rejoice with it.
verses.explanation: The diversity of spiritual gifts in the body of Christ, each given for the common good. As it is written: "And whether one member suffer, all the members suffer with it; or one member ...."

verses.text: Now ye are the body of Christ, and members in particular.
verses.explanation: The diversity of spiritual gifts in the body of Christ, each given for the common good. As it is written: "Now ye are the body of Christ, and members in particular."

verses.text: But covet earnestly the best gifts: and yet shew I unto you a more excellent way.
verses.explanation: The diversity of spiritual gifts in the body of Christ, each given for the common good. As it is written: "But covet earnestly the best gifts: and yet shew I unto you a more excellent way."

verses.text: But this I say, He which soweth sparingly shall reap also sparingly; and he which soweth bountifully shall reap also bountifully.
verses.explanation: God loves a cheerful giver and blesses generosity abundantly. As it is written: "But this I say, He which soweth sparingly shall reap also sparingly; and he w...."

verses.text: Every man according as he purposeth in his heart, so let him give; not grudgingly, or of necessity: for God loveth a cheerful giver.
verses.explanation: God loves a cheerful giver and blesses generosity abundantly. As it is written: "Every man according as he purposeth in his heart, so let him give; not grudgi...."

verses.text: And God is able to make all grace abound toward you; that ye, always having all sufficiency in all things, may abound to every good work:
verses.explanation: God loves a cheerful giver and blesses generosity abundantly. Here we read: "And God is able to make all grace abound toward you; that ye, always having a...."

verses.text: (As it is written, He hath dispersed abroad; he hath given to the poor: his righteousness remaineth for ever.)
verses.explanation: God loves a cheerful giver and blesses generosity abundantly. As it is written: "(As it is written, He hath dispersed abroad; he hath given to the poor: his r...."

verses.text: Now he that ministereth seed to the sower both minister bread for your food, and multiply your seed sown, and increase the fruits of your righteousness;
verses.explanation: God loves a cheerful giver and blesses generosity abundantly. As it is written: "Now he that ministereth seed to the sower both minister bread for your food, ...."

verses.text: Being enriched in every thing to all bountifulness, which causeth through us thanksgiving to God.
verses.explanation: God loves a cheerful giver and blesses generosity abundantly. As it is written: "Being enriched in every thing to all bountifulness, which causeth through us ...."

verses.text: For the administration of this service not only supplieth the want of the saints, but is abundant also by many thanksgivings unto God;
verses.explanation: God loves a cheerful giver and blesses generosity abundantly. As it is written: "For the administration of this service not only supplieth the want of the sai...."

verses.text: Whiles by the experiment of this ministration they glorify God for your professed subjection unto the gospel of Christ, and for your liberal distribution unto them, and unto all men;
verses.explanation: God loves a cheerful giver and blesses generosity abundantly. As it is written: "Whiles by the experiment of this ministration they glorify God for your profe...."

verses.text: And by their prayer for you, which long after you for the exceeding grace of God in you.
verses.explanation: God loves a cheerful giver and blesses generosity abundantly. As it is written: "And by their prayer for you, which long after you for the exceeding grace of ...."

verses.text: Thanks be unto God for his unspeakable gift.
verses.explanation: God loves a cheerful giver and blesses generosity abundantly. As it is written: "Thanks be unto God for his unspeakable gift."

verses.text: Blessed be the God and Father of our Lord Jesus Christ, who hath blessed us with all spiritual blessings in heavenly places in Christ:
verses.explanation: Paul praises God for every spiritual blessing in Christ, chosen before the foundation of the world. As it is written: "Blessed be the God and Father of our Lord Jesus Christ, who hath blessed us w...."

verses.text: According as he hath chosen us in him before the foundation of the world, that we should be holy and without blame before him in love:
verses.explanation: Paul praises God for every spiritual blessing in Christ, chosen before the foundation of the world. As it is written: "According as he hath chosen us in him before the foundation of the world, tha...."

verses.text: Having predestinated us unto the adoption of children by Jesus Christ to himself, according to the good pleasure of his will,
verses.explanation: Paul praises God for every spiritual blessing in Christ, chosen before the foundation of the world. As it is written: "Having predestinated us unto the adoption of children by Jesus Christ to hims...."

verses.text: In whom we have redemption through his blood, the forgiveness of sins, according to the riches of his grace;
verses.explanation: Paul praises God for every spiritual blessing in Christ, chosen before the foundation of the world. As it is written: "In whom we have redemption through his blood, the forgiveness of sins, accord...."

verses.text: Wherein he hath abounded toward us in all wisdom and prudence;
verses.explanation: Paul praises God for every spiritual blessing in Christ, chosen before the foundation of the world. As it is written: "Wherein he hath abounded toward us in all wisdom and prudence;."

verses.text: Having made known unto us the mystery of his will, according to his good pleasure which he hath purposed in himself:
verses.explanation: Paul praises God for every spiritual blessing in Christ, chosen before the foundation of the world. As it is written: "Having made known unto us the mystery of his will, according to his good plea...."

verses.text: In whom ye also trusted, after that ye heard the word of truth, the gospel of your salvation: in whom also after that ye believed, ye were sealed with that holy Spirit of promise,
verses.explanation: Paul praises God for every spiritual blessing in Christ, chosen before the foundation of the world. As it is written: "In whom ye also trusted, after that ye heard the word of truth, the gospel of...."

verses.text: Which is the earnest of our inheritance until the redemption of the purchased possession, unto the praise of his glory.
verses.explanation: Paul praises God for every spiritual blessing in Christ, chosen before the foundation of the world. As it is written: "Which is the earnest of our inheritance until the redemption of the purchased...."

verses.text: The eyes of your understanding being enlightened; that ye may know what is the hope of his calling, and what the riches of the glory of his inheritance in the saints,
verses.explanation: Paul praises God for every spiritual blessing in Christ, chosen before the foundation of the world. As it is written: "The eyes of your understanding being enlightened; that ye may know what is th...."

verses.text: And what is the exceeding greatness of his power to us-ward who believe, according to the working of his mighty power,
verses.explanation: Paul praises God for every spiritual blessing in Christ, chosen before the foundation of the world. As it is written: "And what is the exceeding greatness of his power to us-ward who believe, acco...."

verses.text: Which he wrought in Christ, when he raised him from the dead, and set him at his own right hand in the heavenly places,
verses.explanation: Paul praises God for every spiritual blessing in Christ, chosen before the foundation of the world. As it is written: "Which he wrought in Christ, when he raised him from the dead, and set him at ...."

verses.text: Far above all principality, and power, and might, and dominion, and every name that is named, not only in this world, but also in that which is to come:
verses.explanation: Paul praises God for every spiritual blessing in Christ, chosen before the foundation of the world. As it is written: "Far above all principality, and power, and might, and dominion, and every nam...."

verses.text: And hath put all things under his feet, and gave him to be the head over all things to the church,
verses.explanation: Paul praises God for every spiritual blessing in Christ, chosen before the foundation of the world. As it is written: "And hath put all things under his feet, and gave him to be the head over all ...."

verses.text: Which is his body, the fulness of him that filleth all in all.
verses.explanation: Paul praises God for every spiritual blessing in Christ, chosen before the foundation of the world. As it is written: "Which is his body, the fulness of him that filleth all in all."

verses.text: For the word of God is quick, and powerful, and sharper than any twoedged sword, piercing even to the dividing asunder of soul and spirit, and of the joints and marrow, and is a discerner of the thoughts and intents of the heart.
verses.explanation: The word of God is living and active, and Jesus is our great High Priest who invites us to God's rest. As it is written: "For the word of God is quick, and powerful, and sharper than any twoedged swo...."

verses.text: Neither is there any creature that is not manifest in his sight: but all things are naked and opened unto the eyes of him with whom we have to do.
verses.explanation: The word of God is living and active, and Jesus is our great High Priest who invites us to God's rest. As it is written: "Neither is there any creature that is not manifest in his sight: but all thin...."

verses.text: Seeing then that we have a great high priest, that is passed into the heavens, Jesus the Son of God, let us hold fast our profession.
verses.explanation: The word of God is living and active, and Jesus is our great High Priest who invites us to God's rest. As it is written: "Seeing then that we have a great high priest, that is passed into the heavens...."

verses.text: For we have not an high priest which cannot be touched with the feeling of our infirmities; but was in all points tempted like as we are, yet without sin.
verses.explanation: The word of God is living and active, and Jesus is our great High Priest who invites us to God's rest. As it is written: "For we have not an high priest which cannot be touched with the feeling of ou...."

verses.text: Let us therefore come boldly unto the throne of grace, that we may obtain mercy, and find grace to help in time of need.
verses.explanation: The word of God is living and active, and Jesus is our great High Priest who invites us to God's rest, commanding His people: "Let us therefore come boldly unto the throne of grace, that we may obtain mer...."

verses.text: Now faith is the substance of things hoped for, the evidence of things not seen.
verses.explanation: Faith is the substance of things hoped for, illustrated through heroes of faith. As it is written: "Now faith is the substance of things hoped for, the evidence of things not seen."

verses.text: Through faith we understand that the worlds were framed by the word of God, so that things which are seen were not made of things which do appear.
verses.explanation: Faith is the substance of things hoped for, illustrated through heroes of faith. As it is written: "Through faith we understand that the worlds were framed by the word of God, s...."
